Declares a namespace package using `pkg_resources`.

# Purpose
This code is a namespace package declaration using `pkg_resources` from the `setuptools` library. It allows the package to be split across multiple directories or distributions, enabling different parts of the package to be installed separately. The `declare_namespace` function is called with `__name__`, which is the name of the current package, to indicate that it is a namespace package. This approach is useful for organizing large projects or for distributing plugins or extensions.
